'''Engebo V''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] with constant winds.

==History==
Engebo V was a planet of [[Nerf/Legends|nerf]] ranches that was colonized by [[Outer Rim Oreworks Company]], who [[Mining/Legends|mined]] most of Engebo's mineral resources and later abandoned the world. At some point afterward, the planet was infested with [[skekfish]], which wiped out the population of Engebo V.

{{Planet-stub}}
